description: 小红书图文发布流程（基于 red.pyc 反编译的真实确定性步骤 + AI 兜底）
login_check_selector: input[placeholder='填写标题会有更多赞哦'] | input[type='file'] | div[contenteditable='true']

steps.descript: 导航到小红书图文发布页

steps.value: var container = document.querySelector('.publish-page'); if (container) { container.scrollTop = 0; } await new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, 300); }); return 'scrolled to top';
steps.descript: 滚动到表单顶部（确保标题输入框在视口内）

steps.ai_intent: 找到小红书标题输入框并逐字符输入
找到小红书正文编辑器并填入内容

steps.value: var container = document.querySelector('.publish-page'); if (container) { container.scrollTop = container.scrollHeight; } await new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, 300); }); var btn = document.querySelector('xhs-publish-btn'); if (!btn) { return JSON.stringify({ error: 'xhs-publish-btn not found' }); } btn.scrollIntoView({ block: 'center', behavior: 'instant' }); await new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, 500); }); var r = btn.getBoundingClientRect(); var clickX = r.x + r.width * 0.95; var clickY = r.y + r.height / 2; window.__jlyl_cover_img_x = clickX; window.__jlyl_cover_img_y = clickY; var elsAtPoint = document.elementsFromPoint(clickX, clickY).map(function(e) { return e.tagName + (e.className && typeof e.className === 'string' ? '.' + e.className.split(' ').join('.') : ''); }).slice(0, 5); var cs = window.getComputedStyle(btn); var textContent = btn.textContent ? btn.textContent.trim().substring(0, 100) : '(empty)'; return JSON.stringify({ x: Math.round(clickX), y: Math.round(clickY), w: Math.round(r.width), h: Math.round(r.height), btnLeft: Math.round(r.x), btnRight: Math.round(r.right), btnTop: Math.round(r.y), btnBottom: Math.round(r.bottom), elementsAtPoint: elsAtPoint, pointerEvents: cs.pointerEvents, visibility: cs.visibility, display: cs.display, opacity: cs.opacity, textContent: textContent });
steps.descript: 滚动按钮到视口中央并计算点击坐标（95%位置）+ 诊断 elementsFromPoint 和按钮样式
点击发布按钮（通过 window 坐标穿透 closed Shadow DOM）
steps.ai_intent: 找到小红书发布按钮并点击

steps.descript: 等待2秒后检查是否有确认弹窗

steps.value: var dialogs = document.querySelectorAll('.el-dialog, .ant-modal, .modal, [role="dialog"], .el-message-box'); var clicked = false; for (var i = 0; i < dialogs.length; i++) { var d = dialogs[i]; if (d.offsetParent !== null) { var btns = d.querySelectorAll('button'); for (var j = 0; j < btns.length; j++) { var text = btns[j].textContent.trim(); if (text.indexOf('确认') >= 0 || text.indexOf('确定') >= 0 || text.indexOf('发布') >= 0 || text.indexOf('继续') >= 0) { btns[j].click(); clicked = true; break; } } } } return clicked ? 'clicked confirm in dialog' : 'no dialog';
steps.descript: 检查并处理确认弹窗（如有）

steps.value: var url = window.location.href; for (var i = 0; i < 20; i++) { if (url.indexOf('publish/success') >= 0 || url.indexOf('publish/result') >= 0) { return url; } var bodyText = document.body.innerText; if (bodyText.indexOf('发布成功') >= 0 || bodyText.indexOf('笔记已发布') >= 0) { return 'success: ' + url; } var hasError = bodyText.indexOf('发布失败') >= 0 || bodyText.indexOf('请填写') >= 0 || bodyText.indexOf('不能为空') >= 0; if (hasError) { var titleEl = document.querySelector("input[placeholder='填写标题会有更多赞哦']"); var titleVal = titleEl ? titleEl.value : '(not found)'; throw new Error('小红书发布失败: 页面检测到错误提示, URL=' + url + ', title=' + titleVal + ', bodyPreview=' + bodyText.substring(0, 500)); } await new Promise(function(r) { setTimeout(r, 500); }); url = window.location.href; } var titleEl2 = document.querySelector("input[placeholder='填写标题会有更多赞哦']"); var titleVal2 = titleEl2 ? titleEl2.value : '(not found)'; var btn = document.querySelector('xhs-publish-btn'); var btnRect = btn ? JSON.stringify(btn.getBoundingClientRect()) : '(not found)'; throw new Error('小红书发布未成功: 10秒内URL未跳转且无成功提示, URL=' + url + ', title=' + titleVal2 + ', btnRect=' + btnRect);
steps.descript: 轮询验证发布成功（每500ms检查一次，最长10秒，失败时输出标题值和按钮位置用于诊断）
